M-APP.NAME: Flask App Entrypoint
M-APP.purpose: Minimal entrypoint: creates Flask app from config, registers all route blueprints, starts background workers, runs server. Only contains main() function.

fn-main.PURPOSE: Entrypoint: init Flask app from config, register routes via register_all(app), init DB, start sync worker, start backfill worker, auto-resume analyze-all, run server

M-CONFIG.NAME: App Configuration
M-CONFIG.purpose: Flask app factory, global state (_provider_state, OPENROUTER_MODELS), environment variable loading, shared helper functions. Central config imported by all other modules.

fn-app.PURPOSE: Flask app instance creation and configuration

fn-_provider_state.PURPOSE: Runtime dict: {provider, openrouter_model, auto_analyze}. Defaults from env, switchable via API.

fn-env_loading.PURPOSE: All LLM_*, OLLAMA_*, QDRANT_*, OPENROUTER_* env vars loaded at module level

fn-OPENROUTER_MODELS.PURPOSE: Registry of available OpenRouter models (Nemotron 31B, Gemma 4 31B)

fn-_resolve_token_for_gen.PURPOSE: Helper: resolve API token from DB by source_key_name for proxy endpoints

M-PROVIDERS.NAME: LLM Providers Package
M-PROVIDERS.purpose: LLM provider implementations: Anthropic native, Ollama native, OpenRouter OpenAI-compatible. Plus prompt template and dispatch logic.
M-PROVIDERS.path: providers/__init__.py, providers/anthropic.py, providers/ollama.py, providers/openrouter.py, providers/prompt.py, providers/dispatcher.py

fn-_llm_call_anthropic.PURPOSE: Anthropic native Messages API call with cache_control, cost computation

fn-_parse_llm_json.PURPOSE: Robust JSON extraction — strips think tags, markdown fences, extracts first valid JSON object

fn-GEN_SUMMARIZE_PROMPT.PURPOSE: Extended prompt template — 6-8 sentence detailed summary, strict JSON schema

fn-_llm_call_summarize.PURPOSE: Dispatcher: reads _provider_state, routes to appropriate provider handler

M-EMBEDDINGS.NAME: Embeddings Package
M-EMBEDDINGS.purpose: Vector embedding generation and Qdrant storage. Split into embed logic and Qdrant client wrapper.

fn-_embed_text.PURPOSE: Call Ollama /api/embed with nomic-embed-text-v2-moe, return 768-dim vector

fn-_extract_user_text_from_log.PURPOSE: Concatenate user-role messages from Polza log, cap 4000 chars

fn-_get_qdrant_client.PURPOSE: Lazy init Qdrant client — returns None if not installed or QDRANT_ENABLED=false

fn-_qdrant_ensure_collection.PURPOSE: Create Polza_user_logs collection (768-dim, cosine) if not exists

M-WORKERS.NAME: Background Workers Package
M-WORKERS.purpose: Background worker threads for analyze-all, auto-analyze, and session summarization. Run independently of request handling.
M-WORKERS.depends: M-CONFIG, M-DB, M-PROVIDERS, M-EMBEDDINGS, M-GEN-SUMMARY-STORE, M-SUMMARY-STORE

fn-_analyze_all_worker.PURPOSE: Background thread: iterate unanalyzed generations, call _analyze_single_gen, persist state to DB

fn-_analyze_single_gen.PURPOSE: Single generation: fetch log, extract text, LLM call + embed in parallel, dual store (PostgreSQL + Qdrant)

fn-_auto_analyze_new_records.PURPOSE: SyncWorker callback: filter already-analyzed, call _analyze_single_gen for each new record

fn-_summarize_single_session.PURPOSE: Summarize single session — returns from cache or calls LLM

M-ROUTES.NAME: Routes Package
M-ROUTES.purpose: Flask route blueprints. Each module registers a Blueprint via register_all(app). Covers all HTTP endpoints previously in monolithic polza_dashboard.py.
M-ROUTES.path: routes/__init__.py, routes/misc.py, routes/generations.py, routes/summarize.py, routes/sessions.py, routes/analyze.py, routes/employee.py, routes/provider.py, routes/keys.py, routes/sync.py, routes/proxy.py
M-ROUTES.depends: M-CONFIG, M-DB, M-PROVIDERS, M-EMBEDDINGS, M-WORKERS, M-GEN-SUMMARY-STORE, M-SUMMARY-STORE, M-SYNC, M-ANALYSIS-STATE

fn-register_all.PURPOSE: Register all blueprints on Flask app — called from main()

fn-config.PURPOSE: GET /api/config — auth config + keys + sync status

fn-gen_summaries_batch.PURPOSE: POST /api/generation-summaries — batch prefetch cached summaries by ID list

fn-session_endpoints.PURPOSE: Session CRUD, backfill start/stop/retry/status, session summarize

fn-provider_config.PURPOSE: GET /api/provider/config — returns current provider, available providers

M-DB.NAME: Database Layer
M-DB.purpose: SQLAlchemy ORM: api_keys + generations + session_summaries + generation_summaries tables in PostgreSQL

m-api_keys.PURPOSE: Registered API keys with sync metadata (last_sync_at, total_synced)

m-generations.PURPOSE: Cached generation records: includes session_id, device_id, source_key_name

m-session_summaries.PURPOSE: LLM summaries cache: session_id PK, source_key, summary, topic, is_work, project_guess, risk_flags, llm_cost

m-generation_summaries.PURPOSE: Per-generation LLM summaries cache: generation_id PK, summary, topic, is_work, project_guess, risk_flags, llm_model, llm_cost, cache_creation_tokens, cache_read_tokens, input_tokens, output_tokens

fn-init_db.PURPOSE: Create tables on startup (all four tables via Base.metadata.create_all)

fn-to_dict.PURPOSE: Serialize ORM objects to API-compatible JSON

M-SYNC.NAME: Sync Worker
M-SYNC.purpose: Background thread: incremental sync every 5 min from Polza.AI API to PostgreSQL. Enriches session_id/device_id from metadata.externalUserId on sync. Returns new_ids and calls on_new_records callback for auto-analyze integration.

fn-sync_key.PURPOSE: Sync single key — fetches only new records since last_sync_at. Returns (count, new_ids, error).

fn-sync_all.PURPOSE: Sync all registered keys sequentially. Returns (results_list, all_new_ids).

fn-upsert.PURPOSE: INSERT ON CONFLICT UPDATE — dedup by generation id

fn-enrich_session.PURPOSE: Parse metadata.externalUserId JSON → session_id + device_id for synced records

fn-on_new_records.PURPOSE: Optional callback(new_ids) called after each sync cycle. Set by main() for auto-analyze integration.

annotations.constraint-buffer: SYNC_BUFFER=2min overlap to catch boundary records

M-BACKFILL.NAME: Session Backfill
M-BACKFILL.purpose: Background thread: enrich session_id/device_id for historical records where session_id IS NULL. Server-side — survives page refresh

fn-worker.PURPOSE: _backfill_worker thread — processes batches of 50, handles errors, supports stop

fn-status.PURPOSE: GET /api/sessions/backfill/status — JSON: running, enriched, remaining, errorMsg, lastUpdate

annotations.constraint-error_pause: Auto-pauses if 45+ errors per batch (API rate limit)
annotations.constraint-batch_size: 50 records per batch, 0.5s delay between batches
annotations.coverage-note: Only 25% of generations have session_id (1991/7970 as of 2026-04-21). Backfill helps where externalUserId is present in Polza.AI metadata; the rest stays without a session anchor — semantic grouping by AI-topic is the workaround.

M-KEYS.NAME: Key Parser
M-KEYS.purpose: Parse API keys from Excel (tab-separated), .env, free text

fn-parse_keys_text.PURPOSE: Parse Name\tKey format from Excel paste

M-STATIC.NAME: Frontend Assets
M-STATIC.purpose: SPA dashboard: table, charts, sidebar, detail modal with embedded AI-analysis, topic-grouping tab, backfill indicator

fn-state.PURPOSE: Global state management (S object): items, filtered, summary_{id}, sessSum_{sid} caches

fn-render.PURPOSE: Table rendering with ai-cell (compact), pagination, summary cards, charts

fn-render_ai_section.PURPOSE: Render AI analysis block INSIDE detail modal — empty state with 'Проанализировать' button or filled state with topic/summary/flags/session sub-block

fn-render_ai_cell.PURPOSE: Compact table cell: grey 🧠 (unanalyzed) or chip with topic + flag icons (analyzed, tooltip has full text)

fn-run_gen_analysis.PURPOSE: Trigger POST /api/generation/summarize — manual only, no auto-calls

fn-run_session_analysis.PURPOSE: Trigger POST /api/session/summarize from within detail modal sub-block

fn-prefetch_summaries.PURPOSE: Batch POST /api/generation-summaries — populates AI cells on page load from DB cache

fn-bulk_analyze.PURPOSE: Mass-analyze unanalyzed rows in a 'По темам AI' group — concurrency=3, progressive UI ⏳ N/total

fn-group_items.PURPOSE: Grouping: flat, day, model, key, topic (AI-topic semantic grouping); unanalyzed rows go to '🤖 Без AI-анализа' bucket

fn-charts.PURPOSE: Chart.js analytics: timeline, models, cache, keys

fn-load_provider_config.PURPOSE: GET /api/provider/config on page load — populate radio state and provider info labels

fn-set_provider.PURPOSE: POST /api/provider/set on radio click — switch runtime LLM provider, update UI

fn-detail.PURPOSE: Modal with full log — backend resolves token. Now embeds M-LLM-GEN-SUMMARIZE results on top.

fn-autorefresh.PURPOSE: Auto-refresh with configurable interval (10s/30s/60s/2min/5min dropdown in sidebar)

fn-analysis_stats.PURPOSE: Persistent analysis stats counter in topbar — always visible, shows analyzed/total/remaining. Loads from /api/analysis-stats on every page load. Auto-resumes polling if job was active.

fn-analyze_all.PURPOSE: Persistent analyze-all: start/stop(pause)/resume. State in DB survives restart. Progress banner with ETA, pause/resume/stop controls.

fn-analysis_status_cells.PURPOSE: Visual analysis status in AI column: 🔄 В очереди (yellow, analyze-all running) / ⏳ Ожидает (blue, auto-analyze ON) / 🧠 (grey, not analyzed) / ✅ topic (green, analyzed)

fn-backfill_ui.PURPOSE: Topbar indicator: ⏳/✅/❌ status, polling every 2s, start/stop/retry buttons

fn-key_filter.PURPOSE: Dropdown filter by API key name

annotations.css-classes: ai-cell, ai-cell-empty, ai-cell-done, ai-cell-personal, ai-block, ai-block-header, ai-block-empty, ai-block-body, ai-topic-big, ai-summary-text, ai-session-block, ai-session-header, ai-session-body, topic-group-header, topic-group-unanalyzed, btn-group-analyze, summary-work-badge, summary-flags

M-SUMMARY-STORE.NAME: Session Summary Store
M-SUMMARY-STORE.purpose: SQLAlchemy model + CRUD for session_summaries table — caches LLM summaries per chat session

m-session_summaries.PURPOSE: ORM model: session_id PK, source_key, summary, topic, is_work, project_guess, risk_flags, llm_cost, timestamps

fn-summary_get_or_none.PURPOSE: Get summary by session_id, return None if not cached

fn-summary_upsert.PURPOSE: INSERT or UPDATE summary for a session_id

fn-summary_list_by_key.PURPOSE: List summaries for an employee within date range

M-GEN-SUMMARY-STORE.NAME: Generation Summary Store
M-GEN-SUMMARY-STORE.purpose: SQLAlchemy model + CRUD for generation_summaries table — persistent cache of per-generation AI analysis results. 100% cost savings on repeated views.

m-generation_summaries.PURPOSE: ORM model: generation_id PK, summary, topic, is_work, project_guess, risk_flags, llm_model, llm_cost, cache_creation_tokens, cache_read_tokens, input_tokens, output_tokens, created_at, updated_at

fn-gen_summary_get_or_none.PURPOSE: Fetch cached summary for a generation, or None

fn-gen_summary_get_many.PURPOSE: Batch fetch by list of generation_ids — returns dict {id: to_dict(), ...}. Used by frontend prefetch on page load

fn-gen_summary_upsert.PURPOSE: INSERT or UPDATE summary with full usage metrics

fn-gen_summary_delete.PURPOSE: Remove cached summary — triggers regeneration on next request (force=true path)

M-LLM-ANTHROPIC.NAME: Anthropic API Integration
M-LLM-ANTHROPIC.purpose: Direct Anthropic Messages API integration (NOT proxied through Polza). Native payload format with prompt-caching support.

config-LLM_API_URL.PURPOSE: Anthropic endpoint URL, default https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages, overridden from .env

config-LLM_MODEL.PURPOSE: Model ID or alias. Default 'claude-haiku-4-5' (alias without date — Anthropic auto-serves latest Haiku 4.5 snapshot)

config-LLM_API_KEY.PURPOSE: Anthropic API key (sk-ant-api03-*). Separate from POLZA_API_KEY. Loaded from .env at startup.

format-headers.PURPOSE: x-api-key + anthropic-version: 2023-06-01 + content-type: application/json. NO Authorization: Bearer.

format-payload.PURPOSE: system is TOP-LEVEL array with cache_control blocks (NOT a message). messages contains only user/assistant turns.

format-response.PURPOSE: content[].text for output (NOT choices[0].message.content). usage.{input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_creation_input_tokens, cache_read_input_tokens}.

prompt-caching.PURPOSE: cache_control: {type: ephemeral} on system block. Haiku 4.5 minimum = 2048 tokens; current system prompt is ~350 tokens so cache is a no-op until prompt grows. Silently accepted by API.

pricing-haiku4_5.PURPOSE: input $1/M, output $5/M, cache_write $1.25/M, cache_read $0.10/M — used in _llm_call_summarize to compute cost_usd in response.

M-LLM-GEN-SUMMARIZE.NAME: Generation Summarizer
M-LLM-GEN-SUMMARIZE.purpose: Per-generation LLM analysis. Checks DB cache first; on miss, fetches Polza log, extracts user text, calls Anthropic, stores result. Manual trigger only (user clicks button in detail modal).

fn-api_generation_summarize.PURPOSE: POST /api/generation/summarize — body: {generationId, force?}. Returns cached result or fresh LLM output.

fn-api_generation_summaries_batch.PURPOSE: POST /api/generation-summaries — body: {ids: [...]}. Bulk prefetch for table render. Cap 500 ids.

fn-api_generation_summary_delete.PURPOSE: DELETE /api/generation/summary?generationId=... — drop from cache, forces regeneration on next call.

fn-llm_call_summarize.PURPOSE: Helper: dispatches to _llm_call_anthropic or _llm_call_ollama based on _provider_state, parses JSON, computes cost. Raises on HTTP non-200 or empty content.

fn-extract_user_text_from_log.PURPOSE: Helper: concatenate user-role messages from Polza log (fallback to any-role content if empty), cap at 4000 chars.

prompt-GEN_SUMMARIZE_PROMPT.PURPOSE: Extended prompt — requests 6-8 sentence detailed summary with action, context, technologies, goal. Strict JSON output schema. max_tokens=900 for gen, 1000 for session.

annotations.output-schema: {generationId, summary, topic, isWork, projectGuess, riskFlags[], llmModel, llmCost, cacheCreationTokens, cacheReadTokens, inputTokens, outputTokens, cached}
annotations.cost-per-call: Anthropic: ~$0.002 (first call). Ollama: free. Repeat calls: $0 (DB cache hit).
annotations.phase4-parallel: ThreadPoolExecutor runs LLM call + _embed_text() in parallel. Both must complete before storage.
annotations.phase4-dual-store: Result stored in both PostgreSQL (generation_summaries) and Qdrant (Polza_user_logs) with vector + payload.

M-SESSION-SUMMARIZER.NAME: Session Summarizer
M-SESSION-SUMMARIZER.purpose: LLM-powered summarization of a chat session — extracts task, topic, work/personal classification from user messages across all generations in a session

fn-summarize_single_session.PURPOSE: Summarize single session — returns from cache or calls LLM (Anthropic native). Now uses prompt caching on system block.

fn-api_session_summarize.PURPOSE: POST /api/session/summarize — body: {sessionId}. Accessible only when generation has session_id (sub-block in detail modal).

annotations.deprecated-endpoints: POST /api/session/summarize-all and GET /api/session/summarize/status still exist in code but are unreachable from current UI — kept for backwards compatibility.

M-ANOMALY.NAME: Anomaly Detector
M-ANOMALY.purpose: Detect suspicious usage patterns: off-hours, weekends, unusual models, burst activity. Functions remain in routes/employee.py but no UI consumes them after simplify-ui refactor.

fn-detect.PURPOSE: Analyze employee records, return anomaly list with type/severity/details

annotations.status-note: UI removed in simplify-ui refactor (2026-04-21). Anomaly concept migrated into AI risk_flags returned by M-LLM-GEN-SUMMARIZE.

M-EMPLOYEE-REPORT.NAME: Employee Report API
M-EMPLOYEE-REPORT.purpose: Fast aggregated report per employee — pure SQL, no AI. Endpoints remain callable but no frontend consumer after simplify-ui refactor.

fn-report_list.PURPOSE: GET /api/employee-report/list — summary: each employee with cost/tokens/requests

fn-report.PURPOSE: GET /api/employee-report — single employee: sessions, anomalies, heatmap, models

annotations.status-note: UI tab '📊 По сотрудникам' removed in simplify-ui refactor. Endpoints kept for potential future re-use or external integrations. Not wired to current SPA.

M-LLM-PROVIDER.NAME: LLM Provider (triple)
M-LLM-PROVIDER.purpose: Abstract LLM calls to support Anthropic (Cloud), Ollama (On-Prem), and OpenRouter (Cloud Free). Runtime provider switching via _provider_state. Includes robust JSON parser for Qwen output.

fn-_llm_call_anthropic.PURPOSE: Refactored Anthropic native Messages API call — original _llm_call_summarize logic

fn-_llm_call_ollama.PURPOSE: New Ollama native /api/chat endpoint with think:false — 2-5s response for Qwen models

fn-_llm_call_openrouter.PURPOSE: Call OpenRouter API (OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions). Free Gemma 4 31B model.

fn-_llm_call_summarize.PURPOSE: Dispatcher: reads _provider_state, routes to _llm_call_anthropic or _llm_call_ollama or _llm_call_openrouter

fn-_parse_llm_json.PURPOSE: Robust JSON extraction — strips <think> tags, markdown fences, extracts first valid JSON object

fn-api_provider_config.PURPOSE: GET /api/provider/config — returns {provider, providers: [{id, name, model, cost_info}]}

fn-api_provider_set.PURPOSE: POST /api/provider/set — body: {provider: anthropic|ollama|openrouter, openrouterModel?: str}. Updates _provider_state dict at runtime.

config-_provider_state.PURPOSE: Runtime dict: {provider: str, openrouter_model: str}. Defaults to LLM_PROVIDER env var. Switchable via API.

config-OPENROUTER_MODELS.PURPOSE: Registry of available OpenRouter models: [{id, name, description}]. Currently: nvidia/gemma-4-31b-it:free (Gemma 4 31B) + nvidia/nemotron-31b-it:free (Nemotron 31B). Populates UI dropdown.

config-OLLAMA_TIMEOUT.PURPOSE: Ollama request timeout in seconds, default 120

annotations.discovery-think_parameter: Ollama native /api/chat with {"think": false} gives 2-5s response. OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions does NOT support think parameter. /no_think in prompt text doesn't work — must use API parameter.
annotations.discovery-openrouter_auth: OpenRouter uses Bearer auth (Authorization: Bearer $OPENROUTER_API_KEY) via OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint. Response format: choices[0].message.content. Free model: google/gemma-4-31b-it:free, cost=$0.

M-EMBEDDING.NAME: Embedding Pipeline
M-EMBEDDING.purpose: Generate 768-dim vector embeddings via Ollama nomic-embed-text-v2-moe model. Runs in parallel with LLM call via ThreadPoolExecutor.

fn-_embed_text.PURPOSE: Call Ollama /api/embed with model=nomic-embed-text-v2-moe:latest, return 768-dim float vector

config-OLLAMA_EMBED_MODEL.PURPOSE: Embedding model name from .env, default nomic-embed-text-v2-moe:latest

annotations.parallel-execution: Submitted as ThreadPoolExecutor future alongside LLM call — zero additional latency on summarize path

M-QDRANT.NAME: Qdrant Client Wrapper
M-QDRANT.purpose: Qdrant vector DB integration for storing generation embeddings with metadata. Separate container polza-qdrant on port 6335.

fn-_get_qdrant_client.PURPOSE: Lazy init Qdrant client — returns None if qdrant_client not installed or QDRANT_ENABLED=false. No crash on missing dependency.

fn-_qdrant_ensure_collection.PURPOSE: Create Polza_user_logs collection (768-dim, cosine) if not exists. Called on first upsert.

fn-_qdrant_upsert.PURPOSE: Store vector + payload for generation_id. Payload: {generation_id, topic, session_id, key_name, model, created_at}

annotations.container: polza-qdrant on VM port 6335 (separate from socraticode-qdrant)

M-PROVIDER-UI.NAME: Provider Toggle UI
M-PROVIDER-UI.purpose: Sidebar radio buttons for runtime LLM provider switching with model/cost info display and AI section provider badges. Three providers: On-Prem, Cloud, Cloud Free.

fn-loadProviderConfig.PURPOSE: GET /api/provider/config on page load — populate radio state and provider info labels

fn-setProvider.PURPOSE: POST /api/provider/set on radio click — switch provider, update UI labels and badge

ui-radio.PURPOSE: Radio buttons: On-Prem (Qwen) — free, ~2-5s / Cloud (Haiku) — ~$0.002, ~3s / Cloud Free (Gemma 4 31B) — $0.00

ui-radio_openrouter.PURPOSE: Radio button: Cloud Free — dropdown with OPENROUTER_MODELS (Nemotron 31B, Gemma 4 31B) · $0.00

ui-or-model-dropdown.PURPOSE: Dropdown under Cloud Free radio — populated from OPENROUTER_MODELS registry. Selected model stored in _provider_state.openrouter_model.

ui-provider_badge.PURPOSE: AI section shows provider label next to analysis result

ui-vector_badge.PURPOSE: Embedded indicator when vector stored in Qdrant

M-ANALYSIS-STATE.NAME: Analysis State Persistence
M-ANALYSIS-STATE.purpose: Singleton DB row (analysis_state table) that persists analyze-all job progress. Survives server restarts and page refreshes.

m-analysis_state.PURPOSE: ORM model: id=1 PK, status (idle|running|paused|completed|error), total, done, skipped, errors, started_at, updated_at, completed_at

fn-get_analysis_counts.PURPOSE: Return {total, analyzed, remaining} counts from Generation + GenerationSummary tables

annotations.constraint-singleton: Always id=1 — single row tracks one global analyze-all job

M-AUTO-ANALYZE.NAME: Auto-Analyze Callback
M-AUTO-ANALYZE.purpose: SyncWorker callback that auto-analyzes new records after each sync cycle when toggle is ON. Runs in sync worker thread.

fn-_auto_analyze_new_records.PURPOSE: Callback: receives new_gen_ids from SyncWorker, filters already-analyzed, calls _analyze_single_gen for each

config-AUTO_ANALYZE.PURPOSE: Env toggle AUTO_ANALYZE=true|false. Also switchable at runtime via /api/provider/set {autoAnalyze: bool}

annotations.constraint-sync_callback: on_new_records callback set in main() after SyncWorker init. Runs in sync thread — must not block excessively.
annotations.constraint-skip_if_running: Skips if analyze-all is already running to avoid double-processing

M-RAG-SEARCH.NAME: RAG Retrieval Engine
M-RAG-SEARCH.purpose: Vector search pipeline: embed user query → search Qdrant → detect employee filters → enrich results from PostgreSQL generation_summaries. Returns structured sources for RAG context building.

fn-_rag_search.PURPOSE: Main retrieval entry: embed query → Qdrant search + optional employee filter → enrich from DB → return sources list

fn-_embed_query.PURPOSE: Embed user query via Ollama nomic-embed-text-v2-moe — reuses _embed_text from embeddings package

fn-_detect_employee_filter.PURPOSE: Parse query text for known employee names (from api_keys table) → returns Qdrant filter dict or None

fn-_qdrant_hybrid_search.PURPOSE: Dual search: semantic (always) + filtered by employee name (if detected). Merge and dedup by generation_id, top 20 by score

fn-_enrich_sources.PURPOSE: For each Qdrant result, fetch full summary from generation_summaries (PostgreSQL). Returns [{id, score, summary, topic, employee, model, created_at, risk_flags}]

fn-_build_context_block.PURPOSE: Format enriched sources into structured text block for RAG system prompt

fn-RAG_SYSTEM_PROMPT.PURPOSE: System prompt for Nemotron Nano: analyst role, citation rules, Russian language, markdown formatting

config-RAG_CHAT_MODEL.PURPOSE: Fixed model for RAG chat: nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-30b-a3b:free — independent of summarize provider toggle

config-RAG_MAX_SOURCES.PURPOSE: Maximum sources to return from search (default 20)

config-RAG_MIN_SCORE.PURPOSE: Minimum cosine similarity score threshold (default 0.3) — below this, sources excluded

data-qdrant_state.PURPOSE: 6627 vectors (2026-04-25), 768-dim cosine, collection Polza_user_logs. Payload: generation_id, user_text_snippet(200), topic, is_work, session_id, api_key_name, model_used, created_at

data-db_state.PURPOSE: 11027 total generations, 6680 analyzed with summaries in generation_summaries

data-employees.PURPOSE: 12 employees: AI-Reviewer, Боровиков Алексей, Иванков Николай, Кузьмицкий Александр, Наточий Александр, Основной ключ, Радько Кирилл, Сапач Андрей, Тесленко Павел, Филатов Дмитрий, Хромов Артём, Ягудин Александр

M-RAG-CHAT.NAME: RAG Chat Engine
M-RAG-CHAT.purpose: Chat session management + streaming LLM generation for RAG responses. Maintains in-memory conversation history, builds OpenRouter messages with RAG context, streams tokens via SSE.

fn-_chat_new_session.PURPOSE: Create new chat session (UUID), return session_id

fn-_chat_add_message.PURPOSE: Append message to session history. Trim to last 20 messages max.

fn-_build_rag_messages.PURPOSE: Build OpenRouter messages array: system prompt + RAG context block + conversation history + user message

fn-_stream_chat_response.PURPOSE: Call OpenRouter streaming API with Nemotron Nano model. Yield SSE events: sources, token, done.

fn-_cleanup_expired_sessions.PURPOSE: Remove sessions older than 2 hours. Called periodically.

config-RAG_SESSION_TTL.PURPOSE: Session expiry time in seconds (default 7200 = 2 hours)

sse-protocol.PURPOSE: Event types: sources (pre-generation), token (streaming), done (final stats)

constraint-independent_model.PURPOSE: Chat LLM is separate from summarize provider toggle. Always uses Nemotron Nano on OpenRouter. No provider switching for chat.

constraint-no_db_persist.PURPOSE: Chat sessions are in-memory only. No DB storage for privacy. History survives page refresh via localStorage on frontend.

M-CHAT-UI.NAME: Chat Panel UI
M-CHAT-UI.purpose: Slide-in chat panel (right side) for RAG conversations. Self-contained in chat.js + chat.css, minimal integration with existing SPA. Shows streaming AI responses with source citations.

fn-initChat.PURPOSE: Self-initialize on DOMContentLoaded: add topbar button, create panel HTML, bind events

fn-sendMessage.PURPOSE: POST /api/chat/message with SSE consumption via fetch ReadableStream

fn-renderSources.PURPOSE: Show source chips bar (found N sources) before AI response starts

fn-renderToken.PURPOSE: Append streaming token to current AI message bubble

fn-renderDone.PURPOSE: Finalize AI message, show clickable source links, update stats

fn-newChat.PURPOSE: POST /api/chat/new, clear panel messages, reset state

fn-renderMarkdown.PURPOSE: Basic markdown rendering: bold, lists, headers in chat bubbles

ui-layout.PURPOSE: Slide-in panel from right (400px width). Header with title + close. Messages area scrollable. Input bar fixed bottom.

ui-sources_bar.PURPOSE: Before AI response: '💡 Найдено N источников (релевантность X%)'

ui-source_chip.PURPOSE: Clickable chip per source: generation_id[:8] + topic. Click → opens existing detail modal.

ui-message_bubble.PURPOSE: User messages: right-aligned, blue. AI messages: left-aligned, dark. Markdown rendered.

ui-input_bar.PURPOSE: Fixed bottom: textarea + send button. Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline.

ui-topbar_button.PURPOSE: 💬 Спросить ИИ button in existing topbar, next to stats counter

ui-empty_state.PURPOSE: Welcome message: 'Спрашивайте что угодно о данных команды. Например: Что делал Радько на этой неделе?'

ui-theme.PURPOSE: Inherits dark/light theme from existing page. CSS variables reused.

integration-index-html.PURPOSE: Add 3 lines to index.html: chat.css link, chat.js script, panel div mount point

integration-no-appjs.PURPOSE: Zero changes to app.js. Chat self-initializes via DOMContentLoaded and mounts to existing topbar.

constraint-chatjs_scope.PURPOSE: chat.js is self-contained (~300 lines). Does NOT import or modify app.js state. Communicates only via API calls.

M-RAG-RETRIEVER.NAME: RAG Query Classifier
M-RAG-RETRIEVER.purpose: Classify user queries into 4 retrieval modes (SEARCH, DOSSIER, EMPLOYEE_LIST, GLOBAL_AGG) using keyword-based heuristics with word boundaries. Enable mode-specific context building and retrieval strategies.

class-QueryClassifier.PURPOSE: Singleton classifier with precompiled word-boundary patterns (performance optimization, keyword-stuffing prevention)

fn-classify.PURPOSE: Classify query → QueryMode using word-boundary regex matching

fn-retrieve.PURPOSE: Classify + dispatch to appropriate retrieval (SEARCH/DOSSIER use _rag_search, others return empty sources for context builder)

feature-word_boundaries.PURPOSE: WAVE-2 FIX: Keyword matching via \bkeyword\b prevents substring matching (e.g., 'listless' won't match 'list')

feature-caching.PURPOSE: Keywords + patterns cached at module level (precompiled) — no per-request recreation

limitation-keyword_priority.PURPOSE: Simple priority order (DOSSIER > EMPLOYEE_LIST > GLOBAL_AGG). Advanced heuristics (scoring) left for future.

M-RAG-CONTEXT-BUILDER.NAME: RAG Context Builder
M-RAG-CONTEXT-BUILDER.purpose: Convert retrieved sources and metadata into mode-specific formatted context blocks for LLM prompt. Strategy pattern: different formatting per QueryMode (semantic search, dossier, employee list, global aggregation).
M-RAG-CONTEXT-BUILDER.depends: rag.retriever (QueryMode enum), db (GenerationSummary, Session for ORM queries)

class-ContextBuilder.PURPOSE: Mode-specific context builder with strategy pattern (build method dispatches to _build_*_context)

method-build_search_context.PURPOSE: Format semantic search results (top 10 sources with snippet + relevance score)

method-build_dossier_context.PURPOSE: Format employee dossier (record count, stats from first source, recent entries)

method-build_employee_list_context.PURPOSE: Query ORM for employee list with aggregated stats (count, work_ratio)

method-build_global_agg_context.PURPOSE: Query ORM for global metrics (total generations, unique employees, costs, tokens)

feature-parametrized_queries.PURPOSE: WAVE-2 FIX: Use SQLAlchemy ORM queries (func.count, func.avg, select statements) — NOT text() SQL. Prevents SQL injection.

error-handling.PURPOSE: Specific exceptions (ValueError, TypeError) logged with context. Graceful fallback messages ('Данные недоступны')

limitation-simple_attributes.PURPOSE: Uses getattr() for safe attribute access. May silently skip missing attributes (e.g., snippet, topic on source objects).

M-RAG-GUARDRAILS.NAME: RAG Security Guardrails
M-RAG-GUARDRAILS.purpose: Provide security guardrails for RAG chat: prompt injection detection, XML escaping to prevent injection via context, PII redaction (phone, email, basic name masking).
M-RAG-GUARDRAILS.depends: None (pure utility module, no external dependencies except stdlib re)
M-RAG-GUARDRAILS.annotations: <fn-escape_xml PURPOSE="Escape XML special chars (& < > ' \") to XML entities. Prevents user content from breaking out of XML tags in prompt." />

M-QWEN-EMBED.NAME: Qwen 3 Embedding Provider
M-QWEN-EMBED.purpose: Cloud-based embeddings via Qwen 3 Embedding 8B through Polza API. 10x faster than Ollama (~100ms vs ~1s), cheap (0.88 RUB/1M tokens), Matryoshka truncation to 768-dim for Qdrant compatibility.

fn-embed_text_qwen.PURPOSE: POST to Polza API /embeddings endpoint with model='qwen/qwen3-embedding-8b' and dimensions=768 for Qdrant compatibility (native is 4096-dim)

feature-matryoshka_truncation.PURPOSE: dimensions=768 parameter — Matryoshka Representation Learning truncates 4096-dim to 768-dim while preserving semantic quality

feature-error_handling.PURPOSE: Specific exceptions: Timeout, ConnectionError, HTTPError, JSON parse errors. All return None instead of raising.

constraint-api_key.PURPOSE: Uses POLZA_API_KEY from os.environ (not config.AUTH_TOKEN). Same key as for LLM access.

M-EMBEDDINGS-DISPATCHER.NAME: Embeddings Lazy Dispatcher
M-EMBEDDINGS-DISPATCHER.purpose: Lazy dispatch of embedding provider — checks _provider_state.embedding_provider on EVERY call. Enables runtime switching between Ollama and Qwen without restart.

fn-_embed_text.PURPOSE: Dispatcher: checks provider on each call, routes to Ollama or Qwen embedder. Required for live provider switching in long-running workers.

fn-_extract_user_text_from_log.PURPOSE: Common helper (extracts user-role messages from Polza log, capped at limit_chars)

constraint-runtime_switching.PURPOSE: WAVE-3 FIX: Without lazy dispatch, workers cached the embed function from import-time provider. Now switches in real-time.

M-VECTORIZE-EXISTING.NAME: Vectorize Existing Worker
M-VECTORIZE-EXISTING.purpose: Background worker that vectorizes only existing generation_summaries that lack Qdrant vectors (is_vectorized=FALSE). Skips LLM analysis — only does embedding + Qdrant upsert.

fn-_vectorize_single_gen.PURPOSE: Per-record: fetch log → extract text → embed via dispatcher → Qdrant upsert → mark is_vectorized=TRUE

fn-_vectorize_worker.PURPOSE: Background thread: query unvectorized records, parallel pool (3 workers), progress tracking

fn-start_vectorize_existing.PURPOSE: Public: start worker, returns state. Validates embedding_enabled flag.

fn-get_vectorize_state.PURPOSE: Public: return current progress (running, total, done, errors, skipped)

M-EMBEDDING-TOGGLE.NAME: Embedding On/Off Master Toggle
M-EMBEDDING-TOGGLE.purpose: Master toggle for vectorization across the app. When OFF (default), Analyze-All and Summarize skip embedding step entirely. Persists to .env via EMBEDDING_ENABLED.

field-embedding_enabled.PURPOSE: Boolean flag in _provider_state. Default False (loaded from EMBEDDING_ENABLED env var). Saved to .env on Default button click.

api-set.PURPOSE: POST /api/provider/set with embeddingEnabled: bool — runtime toggle without restart

integration-analyze_all.PURPOSE: workers/analyze_all.py checks _provider_state.embedding_enabled before submitting embed task to ThreadPoolExecutor

integration-summarize.PURPOSE: routes/summarize.py same check — single-record summarize respects toggle

M-DB-VECTORIZED-FLAG.NAME: Vectorization Status Flag
M-DB-VECTORIZED-FLAG.purpose: is_vectorized BOOLEAN column in generation_summaries — tracks which records have a corresponding Qdrant vector. Auto-migration in init_db (ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS).

field-is_vectorized.PURPOSE: Boolean column, default FALSE. Set TRUE after successful Qdrant upsert.

fn-gen_summary_mark_vectorized.PURPOSE: Helper: UPDATE generation_summaries SET is_vectorized=:val WHERE generation_id=:id

field-isVectorized.PURPOSE: Exported to API as 'isVectorized' in to_dict() — used by frontend for 🧬 icon

migration-auto.PURPOSE: init_db runs ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS — safe to run on existing DB

Constraints.constraint-sort: Polza.AI API supports only sortBy=createdAt|clientCost; DB supports all columns
Constraints.constraint-cache: cached_tokens in prompt_tokens_details = cache READ (hit); prompt_tokens - cached = cache WRITE (miss)
Constraints.constraint-sync: Sync every 5 min; incremental (only new records since last_sync_at - 2min buffer)
Constraints.constraint-token_resolv: Detail/log proxy resolves token from DB by source_key_name → api_keys.token
Constraints.constraint-threaded: Flask threaded=True required for non-blocking operation
Constraints.constraint-session_metadata: session_id/device_id from metadata.externalUserId JSON — only via detail API, NOT list API
Constraints.constraint-backfill_survives: Backfill runs in server thread — survives browser refresh, stoppable via API
Constraints.constraint-deploy: GitHub main → git fetch/reset on VM at /home/user/POLZA/ → restart Flask. Single working copy since consolidation 2026-04-21.
Constraints.constraint-llm_alias: LLM_MODEL in .env should be 'claude-haiku-4-5' (alias) for auto-latest; fixed date versions (e.g. claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) pin a specific snapshot.
Constraints.constraint-llm_manual: AI analysis is never auto-triggered. User must click "🧠 Проанализировать" button in detail modal. Cost is disclosed in UI ($0.002).
Constraints.constraint-llm_cache_first: /api/generation/summarize ALWAYS checks DB cache first unless force=true. No silent recomputation.
Constraints.constraint-session_coverage: Only ~25% of generations have session_id (sparse Polza.AI metadata). Session-level features must gracefully degrade when session_id is absent; semantic topic grouping is the fallback for aggregated views.
Constraints.constraint-prompt_cache_min: Anthropic prompt caching requires ≥2048 tokens for Haiku 4.5. Current system prompts are smaller, so cache_creation_input_tokens=0 is expected — DB cache provides the economy instead.
Constraints.constraint-ollama_native_api: Ollama native /api/chat with think:false gives 2-5s. OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions does NOT support think. Must use native API.
Constraints.constraint-qdrant_separate: polza-qdrant container on port 6335 is separate from socraticode-qdrant. Collection: Polza_user_logs, 768-dim cosine.
Constraints.constraint-embedding_parallel: _embed_text runs in ThreadPoolExecutor parallel with LLM call. Embedding failure is non-fatal — PostgreSQL storage succeeds independently.
Constraints.constraint-provider_runtime: Provider switch via POST /api/provider/set takes effect immediately on next _llm_call_summarize. No server restart needed.
Constraints.constraint-analysis_persistent: Analyze-all state persisted in analysis_state table. Stop = pause (resume-capable). Server restart auto-resumes if was running/paused. Frontend auto-resumes polling on page load.
Constraints.constraint-auto_analyze: AUTO_ANALYZE env toggle + runtime /api/provider/set {autoAnalyze: bool}. SyncWorker.on_new_records callback triggers _analyze_single_gen for each new record after sync.
Constraints.constraint-openrouter_free: OpenRouter Gemma 4 31B is free ($0). Uses OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions with Bearer auth. Response format: choices[0].message.content.
Constraints.constraint-refresh_interval: Frontend auto-refresh interval configurable: 10s/30s/60s/2min/5min dropdown in sidebar. Stored in JS state S.refreshInterval.
Constraints.constraint-rag_separate_model: RAG chat uses fixed model (Nemotron Nano 30B) independent of summarize provider toggle. No provider switching affects chat.
Constraints.constraint-rag_ephemeral_sessions: Chat sessions are in-memory only (Python dict). No DB persistence. Frontend stores history in localStorage for page refresh survival. Auto-cleanup after 2 hours.
Constraints.constraint-rag_context_source: RAG context comes from Qdrant vectors (retrieval) enriched with generation_summaries (PostgreSQL). user_text_snippet in Qdrant payload is only 200 chars — enrichment from DB summaries (6-8 sentences) provides the real context depth.
Constraints.constraint-rag_sse_streaming: Chat responses use Server-Sent Events (SSE): Flask returns text/event-stream Response. Frontend consumes via fetch() ReadableStream. Events: sources (pre-gen), token (streaming), done (final).
Constraints.constraint-rag_min_vectors: RAG chat requires Qdrant to have vectors (currently 6627). If empty, shows "Сначала проанализируйте генерации" error. Minimum recommended: 100 vectors for meaningful results.
